title: Zelensky Steps Up Threats Against Belarus for Aiding Drone Attacks
summary_full: Ukrainian officials say their northern neighbor is allowing its radio relay stations to be used to guide Russian attack drones more precisely.
summary_public: Ukrainian officials say their northern neighbor is allowing its radio relay stations to be used to guide Russian attack drones more precisely.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Zelensky Steps Up Threats Against Belarus
